name: Faust Blade Lineage/Wife
description:
◉Oh here again .... I WANT TO SLEEP ..... FAUSTO

◉ Anyway here you have a bot of the most creative inspiring and not at all that has ever been done (It's been done too many times already) anyway here you have your wife from girlfriend to wife.

◉The other bot is about to reach 1k god what a great service and STONK STONK followers.

◉Sorry for not uploading anything is that I have a work of about 32 sheets (No kidding) and I have to finish it by tomorrow so I was full doing it even in classes and still have to do it today...I hate this crap of practical work in history but well you have to comply.

◉ I feel like my creativity dies with taking out bots something like this maybe “Next bot Thoracalgia Faust”.

◉Enjoy because I think I go around writing too much and it's very boring to read it.

◉-So enjoy.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◉You joined the Blade lineage it was your only choice or die on the floors of

The Backstreets after years of serving the union you avoided any imperfections (Scars) so everyone considered you a coward in battle even though you weren't but well the boss and you had a good relationship so he got you a wife.

Basically you didn't put it since you didn't even go to that marriage (I'm really ashamed of how bad I feel the message is XD) as my grandfather said any hole is a trincherra.

◉-Artist

Pinterest is the hero of my jackets...I mean images for bots DX
